rules.description: Avoidance of basic copulatives: 'serves as / stands as / boasts / functions as' replacing plain is/are/has. Measured as a ratio against plain copulas, not a raw hit count (one study found a 10%+ drop in is/are in 2023 academic writing).
rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Avoidance of basic copulatives

positive: The team serves as a research unit. The chain stands as an example. The tool functions as a proxy. The framework boasts many features.
negative: The team is a research unit. The chain is an example. It has a proxy mode and it is fast. The parser has three stages and they are stable.

rules.description: Rule-of-three adjective triplets ('comprehensive, multi-pronged, and holistic'), tracked as document-level density. Narrowed to adjective-shaped triplets so technical enumerations ('remote shell, file transfer, SOCKS5 proxy') don't fire.
rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Rule of three

positive: The strengths are numerous, comprehensive, and multifaceted. The approach was comprehensive, multi-pronged, and holistic.
negative: The implant supports remote shell, file transfer, and SOCKS5 proxying.

rules.description: Cross-check: plural sourcing claims ('several sources', 'experts argue') against the document's actual reference count. Fires only when the claimed plurality outruns the references present.
rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Vague attributions of opinion

positive: Several sources support this assessment, and experts argue the trend holds.
negative: Several sources support this: https://a.example/1 and https://b.example/2 and the vendor advisory [1].

rules.description: Mechanical boldface density: every list label bolded plus mid-prose emphasis.
rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Overuse of boldface

positive: **One**: a. **Two**: b. **Three**: c. **Four**: d. **Five**: e. **Six**: f. **Seven**: g. **Eight**: h. **Nine**: i. **Ten**: j.
negative: Only **one** phrase is bolded in this entire document, which is normal emphasis.

rules.description: Skipped heading levels (# straight to ###), a mechanical outline artifact.
rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Section headings

positive:
# Top

### Skipped straight to h3

text
negative:
# Top

## Proper h2

### Then h3

text

rules.description: Title case in headings, strong form only: minor words capitalized mid-heading ('Analysis And Assessment'), which no house style produces.
rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Title case
